title: Internal Error: ../V3Width.cpp:7688: Node has no type
body:
Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, completely self-contained and self-checking so can directly run what you provide. Ideally use test_regress format, see https://veripool.org/guide/latest/contributing.html?highlight=test_regress#reporting-bugs

```
package uvm_pkg;
class uvm_driver #(type REQ= int);
  REQ req;
endclass
endpackage
package s_t_pkg;
    import uvm_pkg::*;
class s_txn_base;
  extern function bit is_posted();
endclass: s_txn_base
function bit s_txn_base::is_posted();
endfunction : is_posted;
class s_t_txn extends s_txn_base;
endclass: s_t_txn
class s_t_driver extends uvm_driver#(s_t_txn);  
    bit     s_t_p_np_cpl=1;
    extern task run_phase( int phase);
endclass: s_t_driver
task s_t_driver::run_phase( int phase);
  if (s_t_p_np_cpl==0) begin  
    forever begin
      if (req == null) begin
      end else begin
         if (req.is_posted) begin
         end
      end  
    end  
  end  
endtask: run_phase
endpackage
module tb_top;
endmodule : tb_top
```

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

```
verilator --sv --timing --cc --top-module tb_top test.sv
%Error: Internal Error: test.sv:24:10: ../V3Width.cpp:7688: Node has no type
                                     : ... note: In instance 'tb_top'
   24 |          if (req.is_posted) begin
      |          ^~
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

```
Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-73-g83ff8e13b
```

What OS and distribution are you using?

```
Linux 4.18.0-553.22.1.el8_10.x86_64
```
